title: Test: Add accessibility testing
original_text: Added accessibility testing with axe. Implemented accessibility tests for all pages. Added accessibility tests for keyboard navigation. Implemented accessibility tests for screen readers. Added accessibility test reporting. Result: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant.
expected_subject: test(a11y): add accessibility testing with axe
expected_body_lines: - Implement accessibility tests for all pages
- Add accessibility tests for keyboard navigation
- Implement accessibility tests for screen readers
expected_command: git commit -m "test(a11y): add accessibility testing with axe"
